description_long: This object is a stylized representation of a duck with a rounded, plump body and a short, slightly upturned tail. Its body is predominantly dark gray, with a distinct white patch covering the upper beak and forehead, reminiscent of the Eurasian Coot. The beak is long, pointed, and pale, contrasting with the rest of the body. The eyes are small and red, set on either side of the head, giving it a striking appearance. The surface appears matte and smooth, with minimal textural detail, and the overall form is simplified with angular facets. The duck is depicted in a resting or swimming posture, with its body low and legs not visible.
description: A stylized, dark gray duck with a white facial shield and pointed pale beak, featuring red eyes and a smooth, matte surface.
description_view_0: Front view shows the white facial shield, pointed beak, and both red eyes clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the duck's plump body, short tail, and the profile of the white shield and beak.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the rounded back, short tail, and the overall width of the body.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the other profile and the same key features.
